attach_user_policy: Attaches a managed policy to an IAM user, targeting individual users rather than groups.
attach_group_policy: Attaches a managed policy to an IAM group and returns a structured JSON response containing the group name.
detach_user_policy: Detaches a managed policy from an IAM user, returning a JSON response containing the tool identifier and user name.
detach_group_policy: Detaches a managed policy from an IAM group, removing it from the group without deleting the policy itself. Targets IAM groups, not individual users.
list_policies: Lists managed IAM policies (AWS or customer-managed) at the account level, excluding inline policies embedded in users or roles. Unlike tools that return inline policies, this tool focuses exclusively on standalone managed policies.
list_user_policies: Returns the names of inline policies embedded directly in the specified IAM user, not standalone managed policies.
list_role_policies: Lists inline policies embedded directly in the specified IAM role, excluding standalone managed policies. Returns policy names as a JSON string with a stub response.
list_users: Lists IAM users in the account, returning a paginated list of user records. Returns only users — NOT groups or roles.
list_groups: Lists IAM groups in the account and returns a paginated list of group records. Returns only groups — NOT users or roles.
list_roles: Returns a paginated list of IAM role records, excluding users and groups.
delete_user_policy: Permanently deletes an inline policy embedded in an IAM user. IRREVERSIBLE — the policy document is destroyed and cannot be recovered. Targets INLINE policies attached to users, not managed policies or roles.
delete_role_policy: Permanently deletes an inline policy embedded in an IAM role. Targets inline policies, not managed policies.
create_user: Creates a new IAM user and returns a JSON containing the user name and a stub. Requires confirmation to proceed.
get_user: Returns a JSON string containing user details and a stub indicator, providing comprehensive metadata about the IAM user.
delete_user: Permanently deletes an IAM user, requiring confirmation; force option detaches policies before deletion.
create_role: Creates a new IAM role and returns the role name in a stub response.

get_user_policy: Returns a JSON string with a stub response containing the user name and tool identifier.
put_role_policy: Creates or updates an inline policy for an IAM role, embedding it directly in the role. Requires confirmation to perform the mutating operation.

create_group: Creates a new IAM group without permissions or members. Returns a minimal response containing only the group name.
get_group: Returns a JSON string containing group name and stub indicator.
add_user_to_group: Adds a user to an IAM group and returns a JSON response containing the group name.
remove_user_from_group: Removes a user from an IAM group and immediately revokes their inherited policies. Returns a JSON response with the tool and group name.
